summary: The user is planning a Manchester City-themed viewing party for an upcoming EPL match, inspired by their recent celebration of the team's title win after watching the final match against Brighton with family. They discussed snack ideas, drink options, and decorations, ultimately deciding on a photo booth and trivia game to enhance the party experience.
facts: The user watched Manchester City's final match against Brighton at home with their family and celebrated their title win. The user plans to host a viewing party for the next EPL match at their place. The user is considering serving The Red Card cocktail and Manchester Malt beer at the party. The user is planning to set up a photo booth area with Manchester scarves and jerseys for guests to take pictures. The user is thinking of having a Manchester trivia game during halftime to keep guests engaged. The user is interested in easy-to-make snacks for the viewing party, including Manchester Muffins and other football-themed treats. The user is looking for sports bars in Toronto that show EPL matches.
